reviewed_findings.plausible_explanation: Correction or reversal of original claim
reviewed_findings.reason: Both R000002 and R004201 are approved with no indication of reversal. Record R004201 has expense_date 2025-02-10 but invoice_date 2025-08-19 (invoice dated after expense), inconsistent with a legitimate claim. No special approval (special_approval=0). Both records share same employee, same invoice, same reason.

R004202 has reimburse_date 2025-03-18 but invoice_date 2025-06-07 (reimbursed before invoice exists), physically impossible. No special approval. Both records share same employee, same invoice, same reason.

Same invoice FP202500000020 used for two different trips (expense_date 2025-01-05 vs 2025-04-10). Policy Article 10 prohibits using same invoice more than once regardless of trip count. No special approval.
Same invoice FP202500000028 with same amount 165.58 used for two different periods (2025-03-09 vs 2025-05-10). Each claim should have its own distinct invoice. No special approval.

reviewed_findings.plausible_explanation: Separate trips under same transport receipt
reviewed_findings.reason: Same invoice FP202500000037 used for two different dates (2025-03-30 vs 2025-06-10). Article 10 is absolute: one invoice, one reimbursement. No special approval.
Same invoice FP202500000055 for 999.76 used at two different events (2025-04-03 vs 2025-07-10). Article 10 prohibits duplicate use. No special approval.

exceptions_or_boundaries_checked: status field: all 'approved' (not reversed or cancelled)
Policy exemptions: none found in Article 10 or elsewhere in 2025 policy
Correction/reversal: no record has status indicating reversal or correction
Record number format: BX2025X prefix does not correlate to any policy exemption
Date boundaries: all records within 2025 policy effective period
supporting_evidence: All 6 invoices appear in find_reused_invoices output with usage_count=2
All 12 records retrieved via get_expense_detail confirm matching invoice_no, employee, and reason
Article 10 text: 同一发票最多报销1次
rationale: All 6 duplicate invoice groups are confirmed violations of Article 10. No legitimate explanation found for any group. No special approval, no reversal, no policy exemption applies. The BX2025X record number prefix does not denote any policy-recognized exception.
